entity: Alex Groza 1950 Rookie of the Year winner is preserved with source name even without a dim_player mapping
notes: Pins award list behavior so null-ID historical winners are not silently dropped. Regression as of the 2026-07 schema migration: fact_award (rebuilt canonical awards table) is missing this 1950 ROY row entirely, even though it is present in src_stg_bref_player_award_shares (season=1950, award='nba roy', player='Alex Groza', winner=true, nba_player_id=NULL). This is a real gap in the fact_award rebuild, not a query bug — flip back to 'stable' once fact_award's build includes pre-1951 no-id award winners.
